modules.name: wwpdb.utils.session.WebDownloadUtils
documentation:
Utilities to manage  web application download requests for archive and workflow data files -.

   URL parameters or keys in the request object.

        'data_set_id'
        'file_source'
        'content_type'
        'format'

   optional
          'wf_instance'
          'version'
          'part'
          'compress'

    response corresponds to  -

      for success -
        self.__reqObj.setReturnFormat(return_format="binary")

      and for failure  -

        self.__reqObj.setReturnFormat(return_format="text|html|json")
File:  WebDownloadUtils.py
Date:  22-Mar-2013   J. Westbrook
Updates:
06-Mar-2014 jdw -- explicitly set return format in the response object.

classes.name: wwpdb.utils.session.WebDownloadUtils.WebDownloadUtils

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.session.WebDownloadUtils.WebDownloadUtils.makeDownloadResponse
documentation:
Return a response object correponding to a download action for data file described by the
parameter content in the request object.

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.session.WebDownloadUtils.WebDownloadUtils.__getDownloadFileInfo
documentation: Extract target file details and return file path or None.

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.session.WebDownloadUtils.WebDownloadUtils.__makeResponseContentObject
documentation: Create a response content object for the input file
This class encapsulates handling download requests for workflow data files -

modules.name: wwpdb.utils.session.WebUploadUtils
documentation: Utilities to manage  web application upload tasks.
File:  WebUploadUtils.py
Date:  28-Feb-2013
Updates:

03-Mar-2013   jdw catch unicode type in empty file request.

classes.name: wwpdb.utils.session.WebUploadUtils.WebUploadUtils

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.session.WebUploadUtils.WebUploadUtils.isFileUpload
documentation: Generic check for the existence of request paramenter "fileTag=".

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.session.WebUploadUtils.WebUploadUtils.getUploadFileName
documentation: Get the user supplied name of for the uploaded file -

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.session.WebUploadUtils.WebUploadUtils.copyToSession
documentation:
Copy uploaded file identified form element name 'fileTag' to the current session directory.

File is copied to user uploaded file or to the sessionFileName if this is provided.

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.session.WebUploadUtils.WebUploadUtils.getFileExtension
documentation:
Return the file extension (basename.ext).

If the input file contains no '.' then None is returned.

if ignoreVersion=True then any trailing version details are
   discarded before extracting the file extension -

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.session.WebUploadUtils.WebUploadUtils.perceiveIdentifier
documentation:
Return the file identifier and identifier source if these can be deduced from
the input file name.   Returned values are in uppercase.
This class encapsulates all of the web application upload tasks.

modules.name: wwpdb.utils.session.WebAppWorkerBase
documentation:
Base class for supporting web application processing modules.

This software was developed as part of the World Wide Protein Data Bank
Common Deposition and Annotation System Project

Copyright (c) wwPDB

This software is provided under a Creative Commons Attribution 3.0 Unported
License described at http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/.
File:  WebAppWorkerBase.py
Date:  28-Dec-2013
Updates:

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.session.WebAppWorkerBase.WebAppWorkerBase.__init__
documentation:
Base class supporting web application worker methods.

Performs URL -> application mapping for this module.

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.session.WebAppWorkerBase.WebAppWorkerBase.doOp
documentation:
Map operation to path and invoke operation.  Exceptions are caught within this method.

:returns:

Operation output is packaged in a ResponseContent() object.

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.session.WebAppWorkerBase.WebAppWorkerBase._saveSessionParameter
documentation:
Store the input (param,value) pair and/or the contents of parameter value
dictionary (pvD) in the session parameter store.

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.session.WebAppWorkerBase.WebAppWorkerBase._getSessionParameter
documentation: Recover session data for the input parameter or return an empty string.

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.session.WebAppWorkerBase.WebAppWorkerBase._getSession
documentation: Join existing session or create new session as required.

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.session.WebAppWorkerBase.WebAppWorkerBase._isFileUpload
documentation: Generic check for the existence of request paramenter of type "file".

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.session.WebAppWorkerBase.WebAppWorkerBase._uploadFile
documentation: Copying uploaded file to the session directory.  Return file name or None.

modules.name: wwpdb.utils.session.WebRequest
documentation:
WebRequest provides containers and accessors for managing request parameter information.

This is an application neutral version shared by UI modules --
File:    WebRequest.py
Date:    18-Jan-2010  J. Westbrook
Updated:
20-Apr-2010 Ported to seqmodule package
25-Jul-2010 Ported to ccmodule package
24-Aug-2010 Add dictionary update for content request object.
26-Feb-2012 jdw  add support location redirects in response object-
20-Feb-2013 jdw  This application neutral version moved to utils/rcsb.
Make dictionary in ResponseContent inheritable.
06-Mar-2013 jdw  add setDictionary() method
07-Mar-2013 jdw  add optional maximum length parameter to response object dump() method.
22-Mar-2013 jdw  incorporate methods for handling binary content, jsonp, and datafile
download data in response content class.
22-Mar-2013 jdw  restore method - getValueOrDefault(self,myKey,default='')
11-Oct-2013 zf   add getDictionary() method
22-Dec-2013 jdw  Add HTML template processing method - setHtmlFromTemplate()
27-Feb-2014 jdw  Add setReturnFormat() method -
13-Jul-2014 jdw  Adjust formating in print methods

functions.name: wwpdb.utils.session.WebRequest.json_serializer_helper
documentation:
Helper function to handle = objects not serializable by default json code

Current -  handling datetime objects and falling back to str()

classes.name: wwpdb.utils.session.WebRequest.WebRequest
documentation: Base container and accessors for input and output parameters and control information.

classes.name: wwpdb.utils.session.WebRequest.FileIterator

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.session.WebRequest.FileIterator.__init__
documentation:
Opens the given file for reading.

Args:
    filePath (str): path of file
    fileSize (int): size in bytes of file
    uncompress (bool, optional): indicates if the file should be
    read uncompressed. Defaults to False.

File iterator for reading big files
in chunks.

Attributes:
    filePath (str): path of file
    fileName (str): name of file
    fileSize (int): size in bytes of file

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.session.WebRequest.ResponseContent.__init__
documentation: Manage content items to be transfered as part of the application response.

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.session.WebRequest.ResponseContent.__setup
documentation: Default response content is set here.

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.session.WebRequest.ResponseContent.get
documentation: Repackage the response for Apache according to the input return_format='html|json|text|...'

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.session.WebRequest.ResponseContent.__processTemplate
documentation:
Read the input HTML template data file and perform the key/value substitutions in the
input parameter dictionary.

if insertContext is set then paramDict is injected as a json object if <!--insert application_context=""-->

Template HTML file path -  (e.g. /../../htdocs/<appName>/template.html)
webTopPath = file system path for web includes files  (eg. /../../htdocs) which will
             be prepended to embedded include path in the HTML template document

class_variables.name: wwpdb.utils.session.WebRequest.ResponseContent.MULTIPART_THRESHOLD
documentation: file size threshold to send file in chunks, 8mb

modules.name: wwpdb.utils.session.SessionManager
documentation:
Provides containment and access for session information.  Methods
are provided to create temporary directories to preserve session files.
File:    SessionManager.py
Date:    14-Dec-2009
Updates:
20-Apr-2010 jdw Ported to module seqmodule.
05-Aug-2010 jdw Ported to module ccmodule
Replace deprecated sha module with hashlib
21-Sep-2010 jdw Remove 'sessions' from internal path used by this module.
topPath now points to the directory containing the hash directory.
20-Feb-2013 jdw Application neutral version moved to utils/rcsb

classes.name: wwpdb.utils.session.SessionManager.SessionManager

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.session.SessionManager.SessionManager.__init__
documentation:
Organization of session directory is --
<topPath>/<sha-hash>/<session_files>

Parameters:
:topPath: is the path to the directory containing the hash-id sub-directory.

methods.name: wwpdb.utils.session.SessionManager.SessionManager.makeSessionPath
documentation:
If the path to the current session directory does not exist
create it and return the session path.
Utilities for session directory maintenance.
